docs.title: Redirecting
docs.text:
Go to the Schema Reference.

The generated class pages include Mermaid inheritance diagrams, and the merged schema artifact is available at Schema YAML.

docs.title: About ALS-KG
docs.text:
als_kg is a LinkML-based schema project for describing the ALS Knowledge Graph in an ontology-friendly form.

The repository is organized around a single primary source schema:

src/als_kg/schema/als_kg.yaml

From that schema, the project generates:

  • LinkML reference documentation under docs/elements/
  • published schema artifacts under docs/schema/
  • Python dataclasses and Pydantic models under src/als_kg/datamodel/

docs.title: Documentation Workflow
docs.text:
Common commands:

just gen-doc
just gen-project
just test

just gen-doc recreates the static MkDocs pages from src/docs/ and regenerates the LinkML reference pages, so the documentation site can be rebuilt even if docs/ was removed.

docs.title: Published Schema YAML
docs.text:
This project publishes the merged LinkML schema generated from:

src/als_kg/schema/als_kg.yaml

Raw artifact links:

  • Schema YAML

Generated reference pages are available in the Schema Reference.

Regenerate the docs and published schema with:

just gen-doc

docs.title: ALS Knowledge Graph Ontology Model
docs.text:
Comprehensive ontology model for the ALS Knowledge Graph (ALS-KG). Uses a local default namespace for ALS-specific classes and slots, explicit Biolink/ontology URIs only for externally defined concepts and predicates, direct object properties for canonical KG edges, and optional evidence-bearing association classes for provenance-rich statements.

URI: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg

Name: als_kg

docs.text: Class Description NamedEntity Root class for all named entities in the ALS-KG ontology OntologyClass Abstract base for entity classes (nodes in knowledge graph) Anatomy Anatomical structure (UBERON ontology) BiologicalConcept Abstract base for functional/biological concepts from GO and related ontologi... BiologicalProcess Gene Ontology Biological Process term CellularComponent Gene Ontology Cellular Component term MolecularFunction Gene Ontology Molecular Function term Pathway Reactome pathway entity representing a curated biological pathway or reaction... ChemicalEntity Abstract base for chemical and pharmacological entities (drugs, exposures, me... Drug Pharmaceutical compound (DrugBank model) ExposureOrStressor Environmental exposure or chemical stressor from CTD ontology DiseaseOrPhenotype Abstract parent class for all disease/phenotype entities Disease Disease entity DiseaseSubtype Molecularly-defined disease subtype derived from clustering analysis (transcr... Phenotype Phenotypic feature (HPO term) MolecularEntity Abstract base for molecular-level entities (genes, proteins, variants) Gene Human gene entity (Entrez/NCBI model) TranscriptionFactor Gene encoding a transcription factor (TF) Protein Protein product (UniProt model) Variant Genetic sequence variant (ClinVar model) Relationship Abstract base for reified relationships (edges with explicit properties) Association Abstract base for optional evidence-bearing associations DiseaseDiseaseAssociation Optional association for Disease -> Disease when disease-disease edges need r... DiseasePhenotypeAssociation Optional association for Disease -> Phenotype when the clinical feature requi... DrugDiseaseTherapeuticAssociation Optional association for Drug -> Disease when therapeutic indication, approva... DrugTargetAssociation Optional association for Drug -> MolecularEntity when action type, binding af... ExposureDiseaseAssociation Optional association for ExposureOrStressor -> Disease when epidemiology, mec... GeneDiseaseAssociation Optional association for Gene -> Disease when causal/risk/protective or corre... GeneExpressionAssociation Optional association for Gene -> Anatomy when expression level, specificity, ... ProteinPathwayAssociation Optional association for Protein -> Pathway when Reactome evidence code, sour... ProteinProteinInteractionAssociation Optional association for Protein -> Protein when interaction score, interacti... TranscriptionFactorRegulationAssociation Optional association for TranscriptionFactor -> Gene when direction, confiden... VariantDiseaseAssociation Optional association for Variant -> Disease when variant-level evidence, clin... VariantProteinEffectAssociation Optional association for Variant -> Protein when protein consequence, predict...

docs.title: Class: Anatomy
docs.text:
Anatomical structure (UBERON ontology). ALS-specific relevance: motor cortex, spinal cord, anterior horn cells, neuromuscular junction. Linked to gene expression and disease manifestation.

URI: biolink:AnatomicalEntity

docs.title: Class: Association
docs.text:
Abstract base for optional evidence-bearing associations. Use when a relationship cannot be represented sufficiently by a direct object property because the edge needs provenance, evidence, confidence, or additional qualifiers. The subject/predicate/object fields allow the association to be materialized as an RDF triple or property-graph edge.

  • NOTE: this is an abstract class and should not be instantiated directly

URI: biolink:Association

 classDiagram
    class Association
    click Association href "../Association/"
      Relationship <|-- Association
        click Relationship href "../Relationship/"


      Association <|-- DiseasePhenotypeAssociation
        click DiseasePhenotypeAssociation href "../DiseasePhenotypeAssociation/"
      Association <|-- GeneDiseaseAssociation
        click GeneDiseaseAssociation href "../GeneDiseaseAssociation/"
      Association <|-- VariantDiseaseAssociation
        click VariantDiseaseAssociation href "../VariantDiseaseAssociation/"
      Association <|-- VariantProteinEffectAssociation
        click VariantProteinEffectAssociation href "../VariantProteinEffectAssociation/"
      Association <|-- ProteinProteinInteractionAssociation
        click ProteinProteinInteractionAssociation href "../ProteinProteinInteractionAssociation/"
      Association <|-- ProteinPathwayAssociation
        click ProteinPathwayAssociation href "../ProteinPathwayAssociation/"
      Association <|-- DrugTargetAssociation
        click DrugTargetAssociation href "../DrugTargetAssociation/"
      Association <|-- DrugDiseaseTherapeuticAssociation
        click DrugDiseaseTherapeuticAssociation href "../DrugDiseaseTherapeuticAssociation/"
      Association <|-- ExposureDiseaseAssociation
        click ExposureDiseaseAssociation href "../ExposureDiseaseAssociation/"
      Association <|-- TranscriptionFactorRegulationAssociation
        click TranscriptionFactorRegulationAssociation href "../TranscriptionFactorRegulationAssociation/"
      Association <|-- GeneExpressionAssociation

  fields allow the association to be materialized as an RDF triple or property-graph
  edge.

docs.title: Class: Disease
docs.text:
Disease entity. Encompasses ALS (MONDO:0007743), related neurodegenerative disorders (FTD, PLS, PMA, SMA), and comorbidities. Follows MONDO disease hierarchy via is_a relationships.

URI: biolink:Disease

 classDiagram
    class Disease
    click Disease href "../Disease/"
      DiseaseOrPhenotype <|-- Disease
        click DiseaseOrPhenotype href "../DiseaseOrPhenotype/"


      Disease <|-- DiseaseSubtype
        click DiseaseSubtype href "../DiseaseSubtype/"


      Disease : comment

      Disease : definition

      Disease : disease_type





        Disease --> "0..1" DiseaseTypeEnum : disease_type
        click DiseaseTypeEnum href "../DiseaseTypeEnum/"



      Disease : hpo_id

      Disease : icd10_code

      Disease : id

      Disease : ingest_date

      Disease : is_obsolete

      Disease : label

      Disease : last_updated

      Disease : mondo_id

      Disease : name

      Disease : omim_id

      Disease : onset_type





        Disease --> "0..1" OnsetTypeEnum : onset_type
        click OnsetTypeEnum href "../OnsetTypeEnum/"



      Disease : orphanet_id

      Disease : source

      Disease : source_version

      Disease : synonym

      Disease : umls_cui

      Disease : xref

docs.title: Class: DiseaseDiseaseAssociation
docs.text:
Optional association for Disease -> Disease when disease-disease edges need relation type, similarity score, shared mechanism, or comorbidity statistics. Materializes to disease_related_to_disease.

URI: alskb:DiseaseDiseaseAssociation

 classDiagram
    class DiseaseDiseaseAssociation
    click DiseaseDiseaseAssociation href "../DiseaseDiseaseAssociation/"
      Association <|-- DiseaseDiseaseAssociation
        click Association href "../Association/"

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : association_id

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : association_label

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : confidence

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : disease_1





        DiseaseDiseaseAssociation --> "1" Disease : disease_1
        click Disease href "../Disease/"



      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : disease_2





        DiseaseDiseaseAssociation --> "1" Disease : disease_2
        click Disease href "../Disease/"



      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : evidence_source

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : evidence_type

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : ingest_date

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : last_updated

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : object

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : predicate

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : relation_type

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : shared_mechanism

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : similarity_score

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : source

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : source_version

      DiseaseDiseaseAssociation : subject

  need relation type, similarity score, shared mechanism, or comorbidity statistics.

docs.title: Class: DiseaseOrPhenotype
docs.text:
Abstract parent class for all disease/phenotype entities. Following MONDO and HPO ontology patterns.

  • NOTE: this is an abstract class and should not be instantiated directly

docs.title: Class: DiseaseSubtype
docs.text:
Molecularly-defined disease subtype derived from clustering analysis (transcriptomics, proteomics, multi-omics). Represents cohort stratification. Links to Disease via is_a relationship; carries distinct clinical correlates.

docs.text:
name: DiseaseSubtype
description: Molecularly-defined disease subtype derived from clustering analysis
  (transcriptomics, proteomics, multi-omics). Represents cohort stratification. Links
  to Disease via is_a relationship; carries distinct clinical correlates.
from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
is_a: Disease
attributes:
  subtype_id:
    name: subtype_id
    description: Custom subtype identifier
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - DiseaseSubtype
  cluster_method:
    name: cluster_method
    description: Clustering approach (NMF, WGCNA, scRNA-seq, consensus)
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - DiseaseSubtype
  cluster_id:
    name: cluster_id
    description: Cluster number from analysis
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - DiseaseSubtype
    range: integer
  signature_genes:
    name: signature_genes
    description: Top discriminative genes for subtype
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - DiseaseSubtype
    multivalued: true
  n_patients:
    name: n_patients
    description: Number of patients in subtype
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - DiseaseSubtype
    range: integer
  cohort:
    name: cohort
    description: Source patient cohort (AnswerALS, NYGC, PRO-ACT)
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - DiseaseSubtype
    - DiseasePhenotypeAssociation
  clinical_correlate:
    name: clinical_correlate
    description: Associated clinical feature or phenotype
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - DiseaseSubtype
  median_survival_months:
    name: median_survival_months
    description: Median survival from symptom onset
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - DiseaseSubtype
    range: float
  source_publication:
    name: source_publication
    description: DOI or PMID reference
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    slot_uri: dcterms:bibliographicCitation
    domain_of:
    - DiseaseSubtype

name: ExposureDiseaseAssociation
description: Optional association for ExposureOrStressor -> Disease when epidemiology,
  mechanism, dose, duration, population, or study design metadata are needed. Materializes
  to exposure_associated_with_disease.
from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
is_a: Association
attributes:
  exposure:
    name: exposure
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - ExposureDiseaseAssociation
    range: ExposureOrStressor
    required: true
  has_disease:
    name: has_disease
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    domain_of:
    - DiseasePhenotypeAssociation
    - GeneDiseaseAssociation
    - VariantDiseaseAssociation
    - DrugDiseaseTherapeuticAssociation
    - ExposureDiseaseAssociation
    range: Disease
    required: true
  predicate:
    name: predicate
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    slot_uri: rdf:predicate
    ifabsent: alskb:exposure_associated_with_disease

    - Relationship

    - VariantDiseaseAssociation
    - VariantProteinEffectAssociation
    - ProteinProteinInteractionAssociation
    - ProteinPathwayAssociation
    - DrugTargetAssociation
    - DrugDiseaseTherapeuticAssociation
    - ExposureDiseaseAssociation
    - TranscriptionFactorRegulationAssociation
    - GeneExpressionAssociation
    - DiseaseDiseaseAssociation
  association_type:
    name: association_type
    description: risk_factor, protective, trigger, modifier, or correlative
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    domain_of:
    - GeneDiseaseAssociation
    - VariantDiseaseAssociation
    - ExposureDiseaseAssociation
  mechanism:
    name: mechanism
    description: Proposed biological mechanism
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    domain_of:
    - Drug
    - DrugTargetAssociation
    - ExposureDiseaseAssociation
  epidemiological_support:
    name: epidemiological_support
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - ExposureDiseaseAssociation
    range: boolean
  odds_ratio:
    name: odds_ratio
    description: Epidemiological odds ratio or equivalent effect estimate
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    domain_of:
    - GeneDiseaseAssociation
    - ExposureDiseaseAssociation
    range: float
  population:
    name: population
    description: Population, geography, occupation, or cohort context
    from_schema: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
    rank: 1000
    domain_of:
    - ExposureDiseaseAssociation

docs.title: Class: Gene
docs.text:
Human gene entity (Entrez/NCBI model). Separate from protein product to properly distinguish genotype from phenotype. Key ALS genes: C9orf72, SOD1, TARDBP, FUS, TBK1, NEK1, SQSTM1, VCP, OPTN.

URI: biolink:Gene

docs.text:

docs.title: Class: Relationship
docs.text:
Abstract base for reified relationships (edges with explicit properties). Follows RDF triple pattern: subject, predicate, object. Can carry additional metadata (confidence, evidence, provenance).

  • NOTE: this is an abstract class and should not be instantiated directly

URI: rdf:Statement

 classDiagram

    click Relationship href "../Relationship/"
      Relationship <|-- Association
        click Association href "../Association/"

      Relationship : confidence

      Relationship : evidence_source

      Relationship : evidence_type

      Relationship : ingest_date

      Relationship : object

      Relationship : predicate

      Relationship : source

      Relationship : subject

docs.title: Enum: RelationshipTypeEnum
docs.text:
Standard relationship types following RDF/OWL semantics

URI: alskb:RelationshipTypeEnum

docs.title: Permissible Values
docs.text: Value Meaning Description is_a None Subclass relationship (taxonomic) part_of None Mereological (compositional) relationship proper_part_of None Strict part-of (excludes identity) participates_in None Agent participates in process has_participant None Process has participant regulates None Regulatory relationship (direction unspecified) positively_regulates None Upregulation/activation negatively_regulates None Downregulation/inhibition associated_with None Statistical/empirical association affects None Causal or functional modification

docs.title: Type: Sparqlpath

A string encoding a SPARQL Property Path. The value of the string MUST conform to SPARQL syntax and SHOULD dereference to zero or more valid objects within the current instance document when encoded as RDF.

docs.title: als_kg
docs.text:
Comprehensive ontology model for the ALS Knowledge Graph (ALS-KG). Uses a local default namespace for ALS-specific classes and slots, explicit Biolink/ontology URIs only for externally defined concepts and predicates, direct object properties for canonical KG edges, and optional evidence-bearing association classes for provenance-rich statements.

URI: https://alskb.org/ontology/als_kg
